name: Amit Desai
tagline: A fresh vision for a modern city.
pastWork: Founded a local NGO focusing on digital literacy for underprivileged students.
Spearheaded the 'Clean Lakes' citizen initiative in 2024.
manifesto: Implement city-wide free public Wi-Fi zones within 2 years.
Establish a startup incubation center to boost local youth employment.

allegations: Accused of violating code of conduct during university elections (2018).

name: Suresh Rao
pastWork: Served as Mayor (2015-2020), overseeing the construction of 3 new flyovers.
Successfully lobbied for central funds to upgrade the district hospital.
manifesto: Complete the ongoing Metro Phase-2 project ahead of schedule.
Increase pensions for senior citizens and widows by 20%.

proved: Convicted under Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act during 2012 protests (Fined ₹50,000).
pending: FIR registered under Sec 420 (Cheating) related to a land allocation dispute (Case pending in High Court).
allegations: Multiple media reports alleging favoritism in awarding municipal contracts (2018).

name: Meera Kapoor
pastWork: Passed legislation mandating 30% female representation in local municipal contracts.
Upgraded 50 government schools with smart classrooms.
manifesto: Expand the subsidized healthcare clinic network to every ward.
Create a dedicated fund for women entrepreneurs.

pending: Defamation case filed by a rival political leader (Sec 499 IPC).

name: Ravi Kumar
pastWork: Negotiated a historic minimum wage increase for textile workers in 2022.
Organized massive relief camps during the 2023 floods.
manifesto: Guarantee minimum support price for local agricultural produce.
Regularize all contractual sanitation workers with full benefits.

proved: Convicted for unlawful assembly and rioting during a 2015 labor strike (Served 1-month sentence).
pending: Charged under Sec 144 for organizing unauthorized protests (2023).
allegations: Accused of inciting violence during union negotiations, though never formally charged.
